memberdef.argsstring: (DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const Domaine_VEF &, const Domaine_Cl_VEF &) const
memberdef.name: calcul_tenseur_face

memberdef.argsstring: (const Domaine_VEF &, const Domaine_Cl_VEF &, DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const Champ_Don_base &, const DoubleVect &, int) const
memberdef.name: calculer_terme_destruction_K_gen

memberdef.argsstring: (const Domaine_VEF &, const Domaine_Cl_VEF &, DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const int &interpol_visco, const double &limiteur) const
memberdef.name: calculer_terme_production_K

briefdescription.para: Compute the production term for the turbulent kinetic energy.

detaileddescription.para: The total production term writes $ P = -\frac{2}{3}k\text{div}(U) + 2\nu_t S_{ij}S_{ij}$ Being in a incompressible flow, the first part is not computed.
Like the TKE and epsilon, P is discretised on face centers.

const
Domaine_VEF& domaine_VEF,
const
Domaine_Cl_VEF& zcl_VEF,
DoubleTab&
prodK,
const
DoubleTab& K_eps,
const
DoubleTab& vit,
const
DoubleTab& visco_turb,
const
int& interpol_visco,
const
double& limiteur
return DoubleTab& prodK

memberdef.argsstring: (const Domaine_VEF &, const Domaine_Cl_VEF &, DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const int &interpol_visco, const double &limiteur) const
memberdef.name: calculer_terme_production_K_BiK

memberdef.argsstring: (const Domaine_VEF &, const Domaine_Cl_VEF &, DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const DoubleTab &, const int &interpol_visco, const double &limiteur) const
memberdef.name: calculer_terme_production_K_EASM

memberdef.argsstring: (const int face, const double visco_face, const DoubleTab &Re_face, const DoubleTab &gradient_face, DoubleTab &P) const
memberdef.name: compute_production_term_EASM

memberdef.argsstring: (const Domaine_VEF &domaine_VEF, const Domaine_Cl_VEF &zcl_VEF, const IntTab &face_voisins, const DoubleVect &volumes, const DoubleTab &tab_beta, const DoubleTab &alpha_turb, const DoubleTrav &gradient_elem, const int nb_consti, DoubleTrav &u_theta) const

memberdef.name: compute_utheta_nbConsti_gt_1_nbCompo_eq_1

memberdef.argsstring: (const Domaine_VEF &domaine_VEF, const Domaine_Cl_VEF &zcl_VEF, const IntTab &face_voisins, const DoubleVect &volumes, const DoubleTab &tab_beta, const DoubleTab &alpha_turb, const DoubleTrav &gradient_elem, const int nb_consti, DoubleTrav &u_theta) const
memberdef.name: compute_utheta_nbConsti_gt_1_nbCompo_gt_1

memberdef.argsstring: (const Domaine_VEF &domaine_VEF, const Domaine_Cl_VEF &zcl_VEF, const IntTab &face_voisins, const DoubleVect &volumes, const DoubleTab &tab_beta, const DoubleTab &alpha_turb, const DoubleTrav &gradient_elem, DoubleTrav &u_theta) const
memberdef.name: compute_utheta_nbConsti_le_1_nbCompo_eq_0

memberdef.argsstring: (const Domaine_VEF &domaine_VEF, const Domaine_Cl_VEF &zcl_VEF, const IntTab &face_voisins, const DoubleVect &volumes, const DoubleTab &tab_beta, const DoubleTab &alpha_turb, const DoubleTrav &gradient_elem, DoubleTrav &u_theta) const
memberdef.name: compute_utheta_nbConsti_le_1_nbCompo_eq_1

memberdef.argsstring: (const Domaine_VEF &domaine_VEF, const Domaine_Cl_VEF &zcl_VEF, const IntTab &face_voisins, const DoubleVect &volumes, const DoubleTab &tab_beta, const DoubleTab &alpha_turb, const DoubleTrav &gradient_elem, DoubleTrav &u_theta) const
memberdef.name: compute_utheta_nbConsti_le_1_nbCompo_gt_1

memberdef.argsstring: (const DoubleTab &visco_turb, const DoubleVect &volumes, const int type_interpo, const int poly1, const int poly2, const double limiteur) const
memberdef.name: get_turbulent_viscosity

briefdescription.para: Get the turbulent viscosity depending on the interpolation choice.

detaileddescription.para: if type_interpo == 0: arithmetic interpolation (instable) if type_interpo == 1: harmonic mean (used for the realisable k-epsilon) if type_interpo == 2: weighted harmonic mean (used for the realisable k-epsilon)

const
DoubleTab& visco_turb
const
DoubleVect& volumes
const
int type_interpo
const
int poly1
const
int poly2
const
double limiteur
return double

memberdef.argsstring: (DoubleTab &prodK, const DoubleTab &gradient_elem, const DoubleTab &visco_turb, const DoubleVect &volumes, const IntTab &face_voisins, const int nfaceinit, const int nfaceend, const int interpol_visco, const double limiteur) const
memberdef.name: loop_for_internal_or_periodic_faces

briefdescription.para: Compute production term on internal and periodic boundary faces.

detaileddescription.para: Using the velocity gradient, the loop computes the production term written $P = 2 \nu_t S_{ij}S_{ij}$ with $S_{ij} = \frac{1}{2}\left(\frac{\partial u_i}{\partial x_j} + \frac{\partial u_j}{\partial x_i})$.

memberdef.argsstring: (DoubleTab &prodK, const DoubleTab &gradient_elem, const DoubleTab &visco_turb, const DoubleVect &volumes, const IntTab &face_voisins, const int nfaceinit, const int nfaceend, const int interpol_visco, const double limiteur) const
memberdef.name: loop_for_non_periodic_boundaries

briefdescription.para: Compute production term on non periodic boundary faces.

detaileddescription.para: Using the velocity gradient, the loop computes the production term written $P = 2 \nu_t S_{ij}S_{ij}$ with $S_{ij} = \frac{1}{2}\left(\frac{\partial u_i}{\partial x_j} + \frac{\partial u_j}{\partial x_i})$.
